checks.finding: Command string contains a root delete pattern.
checks.remediation: Replace with a scoped cleanup command that targets a temporary directory only.

checks.finding: Command string can discard local work.
checks.remediation: Remove hard reset from hooks; use a read-only validation command.

checks.finding: Command string can delete untracked files.
checks.remediation: Move cleanup to an explicit maintainer command outside hook execution.
Hooks should run with normal user privileges and fail closed.

checks.finding: Command string appears to fetch and execute remote content.
checks.remediation: Vendor scripts locally and call deterministic project-local files.

checks.finding: Command string references sensitive files or secret-like paths.
checks.remediation: Remove secret reads from hooks and pass only safe environment variables.
